pi_items.source: Design parameter stated in task description. Standard IEC motor size (37 kW = 50 HP). No external data to verify against — this is a task input, not a derived claim.
Design parameter stated in task description. 415 V is standard 3-phase industrial voltage (IEC 60038). Confirmed by entering into the app's Cable Size Calculator during live testing.
Design parameter stated in task description. 92% is realistic for a 37 kW induction motor (IEC 60034-30-1 IE3 class typically 92.6% at this rating).
Design parameter stated in task description. 0.86 is realistic for a 37 kW induction motor at full load (typical range 0.82–0.90).

Design parameter stated in task description. 100/5 A CT is a standard ratio per IEC 61869. Confirmed by entering into the app's CT Calculator during live testing — the app accepted 100:5 and computed correctly.
Design parameter stated in task description. 5 A secondary is the standard CT secondary rating (IEC 61869). Confirmed in live CT Calculator test.
Design parameter stated in task description. Confirmed by entering into the app's Cable Size Calculator during live testing.

Design parameter stated in task description. The Cable Size Calculator outputs both Copper and Aluminum wire sizes — agent should focus on Copper. Verified during live testing: Copper Wire Size = 4 AWG / 25 sq. mm.
Design parameter stated in task description. 3% is within standard allowable voltage drop range (IEC recommends max 5%). Confirmed by entering into app's Cable Size Calculator.
Independent calculation: P_input = P_output / efficiency = 37000 / 0.92 = 40217.3913 W, rounded to 40217.4 W. Exact match.

Independent calculation: I = P_input / (sqrt(3) * V * PF) = 40217.4 / (1.7321 * 415 * 0.86) = 65.059 A, rounded to 65.1 A. Cross-verified by entering into app's 3-Phase Apparent Power Calculator (I=65.1, V=415 produced S=46793.95 VA) and CT Calculator (CT 100:5 with Sensed Current=3.255A output Actual Current=65.1A).

Independent calculation: I_ct = I_line * (CT_secondary / CT_primary) = 65.1 * 5/100 = 3.255 A, rounded to 3.26 A. Note: Using exact I_line=65.059 gives 3.253, but since the agent will use I=65.1 (rounded), 3.255 rounds to 3.26. Cross-verified in app: CT ratio 100:5 with Sensed Current=3.255A correctly output Actual Current=65.1A.

Independent calculation: S = sqrt(3) * 415 * 65.1 = 46793.95 VA, rounds to 46794 VA. Metadata says 46798 (diff = 4 VA, 0.009%). App live test confirmed S = 46793.950642... VA. The 4 VA discrepancy comes from rounding in the original metadata computation. Both are well within the 3% tolerance. The APP value of 46794 is the authoritative ground truth.

Independent calculation: P = S * PF = 46793.95 * 0.86 = 40242.80 W, rounds to 40243 W. Metadata says 40246 (diff = 3 W, 0.008%). Discrepancy from rounding in original metadata. Both within 3% tolerance. The computed value 40243 is the authoritative ground truth.

Independent calculation: Q = sqrt(S^2 - P^2) = sqrt(46793.95^2 - 40242.80^2) = 23878.67 VAR, rounds to 23879 VAR. Metadata says 23873 (diff = 6 VAR, 0.025%). Discrepancy from accumulated rounding. Both within 3% tolerance. The computed value 23879 is the authoritative ground truth.

Design parameter. 3% tolerance is appropriate for this task — all computed vs metadata discrepancies are under 0.03%, and the tolerance needs to accommodate both mathematical rounding AND app-specific computation differences.

privileged_info_summary: The agent must commission a 37 kW three-phase motor (415 V, 92% efficiency, 0.86 PF) using the Electrical Engineering Calculations Android app. The correct line current is 65.1 A, derived from: P_input = 37000/0.92 = 40217 W, then I = 40217/(sqrt(3)*415*0.86) = 65.1 A. Common errors: 59.9 A (efficiency omitted), 56.0 A (PF omitted), 96.9 A (sqrt(3) and PF omitted). The agent must visit three calculators: (1) '3 Phase Apparent Power Calculation' — enter Terminal Current = 65.1 A, Terminal Voltage = 415 V; the app computes S = 46794 VA; Active Power and Power Factor fields below can give P = 40243 W and Q = 23879 VAR. (2) 'CT Calculation' — enter CT Ratio 100:5 and Sensed Current = 3.255 A (= 65.1*5/100); the Actual Current field is READ-ONLY output showing 65.1 A. (3) 'Cable Size Calculator' — enter Source Voltage = 415, change 'No of Phases' dropdown from default 'Single Phase' to '3 Phase', enter Amperes = 65.1, Allowable Voltage Drop = 3, One Way Distance = 50 meters; the app computes Copper Wire Size = 4 AWG / 25 sq. mm, Aluminum Wire Size = 2 AWG / 35 sq. mm. The agent should end on the Cable Size Calculator screen. The app menu requires 3-4 full scrolls to navigate between the 3 Phase section (screen 1, no scrolling needed), CT/PT section (screen 3, needs scrolling), and Cable section (screen 4, near bottom of menu).
